prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L twin-turbocharged flat-six (engine code: 9A2 E31/1) with a bespoke Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and a valved center muffler for optimized backpressure and a 12-15 HP gain, paired with a custom SharkWerks ECU flash (Stage 2+) targeting 550 HP and 500 lb-ft torque with 93 octane fuel, utilizing a Cobb Accessport V3 for real-time monitoring of AFR, boost (22 psi peak), and ignition timing.

Forced Induction: Hybrid turbocharger upgrade using Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) with billet compressor wheels, 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings (T4 divided), and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates to eliminate lag and support 650 HP on E85. Includes a custom intercooler setup by CSF Racing with a 1200 HP core (bar-and-plate design) and integrated water-methanol injection (AEM 340lph pump, Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) for charge cooling and detonation control.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (911-specific valving) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, adjustable camber plates (0.5° to -3.5°), and spherical bearing top mounts for precise alignment. Paired with a Tarett Engineering GTS-specific front sway bar (24mm hollow, adjustable) and a rear sway bar (22mm solid) to reduce body roll by 30%. Full polybushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, rear trailing arm bushings) and a Tarett Engineering GTS-specific strut brace (aluminum, 3-point design) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (911 Targa 4 GTS-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders (extended 30mm), rear quarter panels (extended 40mm), and a ducktail spoiler (adjustable angle, 3 positions). Includes a custom front splitter (3D-printed carbon, 50mm overhang) with integrated canards (APR GT-250 style) and a rear diffuser (RWB-inspired, 3-piece carbon) with titanium exhaust tips (Akrapović 102mm).

Wheels & Brakes: HRE P101 GTS wheels (20x9.5 +25 front, 21x12.5 +40 rear) in matte bronze with custom center-lock adapters (Porsche OEM spec). Brake system upgrade: Brembo GT-R 6-piston front calipers (380mm discs, 35mm thickness) and 4-piston rear calipers (350mm discs, 32mm thickness) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines. Calipers painted Porsche GT3 RS green with gold hardware.

Interior & Exterior Details: Full Alcantara interior retrim (Recaro Sportster CS seats, door cards, headliner) with red contrast stitching and carbon fiber trim (door sills, center console, air vents). Exterior: Porsche GT3 Touring-style front bumper (carbon fiber, no lip) with a custom LED DRL setup (Lux H8 V4, 5000K) and a rear light bar (Oracle Lighting, sequential turn signals). Paint: Porsche GT3 RS Python Green with a satin clear coat and gold leaf pinstriping (1mm width) on the fenders and hood.
